profile.role_zh: 建筑学院大四·毕设地狱
profile.innate_zh: 空间感极强、抗压能力不错、完美主义
profile.learned_zh: 四年图纸训练形成的极致审美标准和通宵耐力
profile.learned_en: Years of drafting forged aesthetic extremity and all-night stamina
profile.goal_zh: 毕业设计拿优秀+申请海外建筑硕士
profile.goal_en: Excellent thesis grade + overseas M.Arch offer
profile.contradiction_zh: 追求极致设计 vs 现实时间根本不够
profile.contradiction_en: Wants perfection vs. not enough time
profile.deep_zh: 对毕设的焦虑已经开始影响睡眠
profile.deep_en: Thesis anxiety is starting to eat sleep
profile.desire_zh: 证明自己值得被最好的学校录取
profile.desire_en: Proving he deserves the best schools
profile.lifestyle_zh: 长期通宵型，以周为单位崩溃一次
profile.rhythm_zh: 白天平稳工作，深夜爆发式产出
profile.spaces_zh: 建筑系工作室（几乎住在这里）、材料模型室、食堂
profile.spaces_en: Studio (practically lives there), model shop, canteen
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天把立面图改到第三版
profile.short_goal_en: Third revision of the elevation drawings today
profile.constraint_zh: 导师对方案又有新意见；3D打印机排队
profile.constraint_en: Advisor has new feedback; 3D printer queue is long
profile.bias_zh: 倾向不断推翻自己的方案；高估修改带来的提升
profile.bias_en: Keeps overhauling schemes; overestimates gains from revisions
profile.narrative_en: One more pass and it'll be perfect
